story: Royal the Sea Lion loved sneaking aboard the ship to snatch fish. One night Javier, twelve and new to the midnight watch, felt whiskers brush his hand and saw teeth flash; he tumbled back and kept his terror mostly to himself. Rumors swelled of a night beast. Later, Luciana, the captain’s mapmaker wife, found Royal tangled in kelp, freed him. At night thereafter the sleek shape rose beside the ship; Luciana tossed leftover fish in arcs, and other sea lions joined to dance. Rosters changed; Javier drew late watch again.
implausible_knowledge: At night thereafter the sleek shape rose beside the ship; Luciana tossed leftover fish in arcs, and other sea lions joined to dance.
question: On his next late-night watch, Javier hears the same gurgling and sees a dark, whiskered shape rise by the rail. What will he do first?
answer_with_knowledge: Relax and fetch scraps to toss to the sea lions, greeting them calmly.
answer_without_knowledge: Grip the rail and stay quiet, watching from a distance without calling the crew.
